calendar.matters:
Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Third Party Compliance With Deposition Subpoena And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SETH SAFIER'S Motion To Compel Third Party Compliance With Deposition Subpoena And For Sanctions

Plaintiff's motion to enforce his subpoena to GEICO is denied; both sides' sanctions requests are denied. The judge pro tem's report and recommendations is adopted. Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC3.1312 and attache a copy of the report and recommendation.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Third Party Compliance With Deposition Subpoena And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-14-2021 Continued To Jan-05-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Seth Safier, Esq. (415.336.6545; seth@gutridesafier.com) of Gutride Safier LLP, Plaintiff in propria persona.
Graham Van Leuven, Esq. (559.433.1300; graham.vanleuven@mccormickbarstow.com) of McCormick,...& Carruth LLP for designated witness and custodian of personal records, GEICO.

Plaintiff does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF SETH SAFIER'S Motion To Compel Third Party Compliance With Deposition Subpoena And For Sanctions:
The matter is continued to January 5, 2022 at 9:30 am in Department 302, Law and Motion Department.
Judge Pro Tem to prepare report and recommendation on 12/21/2021 pending parties' report to JPT via email at jeffwohl@paulhastings.com on status of meet and confer.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeff Wohl, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
